allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path d:\\web\\NewDiary -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'node_modules' } | Select-Object Mode, Name)

Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Test-Path 'D:\\web\\NewDiary\\.github\\workflows'\) { Get-ChildItem 'D:\\web\\NewDiary\\.github\\workflows' | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output 'No CI config found' }")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path 'd:\\web\\NewDiary\\.storybook' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }; Write-Output '---husky?---'; if \(Test-Path 'd:\\web\\NewDiary\\.husky'\) { 'exists' } else { 'no' })

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='development'; const {app}=require\('./server/index.cjs'\); const srv=app.listen\(0,\(\)=>{const p=srv.address\(\).port; const http=require\('node:http'\); http.get\({host:'127.0.0.1',port:p,path:'/api/__nope',headers:{Origin:'https://evil.example'}},r=>{let b='';r.on\('data',d=>b+=d\);r.on\('end',\(\)=>{console.log\('STATUS',r.statusCode,'CSP?',r.headers['x-content-type-options'],'XFRAME?',r.headers['x-frame-options']\);srv.close\(\);process.exit\(0\)}\)}\).on\('error',e=>{console.error\('CLIENT-ERR',e.message\);srv.close\(\);process.exit\(1\)}\)}\); srv.on\('error',e=>{console.error\('LISTEN-ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='development'; const {app}=require\('./server/index.cjs'\); const srv=app.listen\(0,\(\)=>{const p=srv.address\(\).port; const http=require\('node:http'\); const tests=[{path:'/api/auth/me',origin:'https://evil.example',label:'disallowed origin'},{path:'/api/auth/me',origin:'http://localhost:5173',label:'allowed origin'},{path:'/api/auth/me',origin:null,label:'no origin'}]; let i=0; const next=\(\)=>{if\(i>=tests.length\){srv.close\(\);process.exit\(0\);return} const t=tests[i++]; const headers={}; if\(t.origin\) headers.Origin=t.origin; http.get\({host:'127.0.0.1',port:p,path:t.path,headers},r=>{let b='';r.on\('data',d=>b+=d\);r.on\('end',\(\)=>{console.log\(t.label.padEnd\(20\),'->','status='+r.statusCode,'ACAO='+\(r.headers['access-control-allow-origin']||'none'\),'ACAC='+\(r.headers['access-control-allow-credentials']||'none'\)\);next\(\)}\)}\).on\('error',e=>{console.error\(t.label,'ERR',e.message\);next\(\)}\)}; next\(\)}\); srv.on\('error',e=>{console.error\('LISTEN-ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_MAX=3 node -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='development'; process.env.AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_MAX='3'; const {app}=require\('./server/index.cjs'\); const srv=app.listen\(0,\(\)=>{const p=srv.address\(\).port; const http=require\('node:http'\); let count=0; const fire=\(\)=>{http.get\({host:'127.0.0.1',port:p,path:'/api/auth/me'},r=>{let b='';r.on\('data',d=>b+=d\);r.on\('end',\(\)=>{count++;console.log\('req',count,'status='+r.statusCode,'remaining='+\(r.headers['ratelimit-remaining']||'?'\)\);if\(count<6\) fire\(\); else {srv.close\(\);process.exit\(0\)}}\)}\).on\('error',e=>{console.error\('ERR',e.message\);srv.close\(\);process.exit\(1\)}\)}; fire\(\)}\); srv.on\('error',e=>{console.error\('LISTEN-ERR',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
